summary: Comprehensive testing completed for FinRomania V2 improvements. All backend APIs working perfectly (15/15 tests passed including new V2 endpoints). Frontend V2 features fully functional: ticker bar animation, stock detail pages with 30-day charts, AI article translation to Romanian, and improved centered layout.

design_issues.issue: Global indices incorrectly show MOCK badge when they should show real data

passed_tests: ✅ Backend API Health Check - All 15 endpoints working (100% success rate)
✅ BVB Stock Details API - Returns 30-day mock history with proper chart data structure
✅ Global Index Details API - Returns 30-day real history from Yahoo Finance
✅ Article Translation API - Successfully translates articles to Romanian via AI
✅ Ticker Bar Animation - Scrolling ticker at top with global indices and BVB stocks
✅ Stock Detail Charts - 30-day line charts rendering properly with recharts
✅ BVB Stock Details - Shows mock data with MOCK badge and 30-day period indicator
✅ Global Index Details - Shows real Yahoo Finance data with proper charts
✅ Article Translation UI - Romanian translation badge 'Tradus în Română' displayed
✅ Article Source Links - 'Citește la sursă' button at bottom of articles
✅ Centered Layout - Homepage uses max-w-7xl for centered content
✅ Sidebar Layout - News in main area (lg:col-span-3), currencies and indices in sidebar
✅ Navigation - Back buttons working on all detail pages
✅ Chart Functionality - Line charts with proper axes, tooltips, and data visualization
✅ AI Integration - GPT-4o-mini successfully translating articles via Emergent Universal Key
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Remove MOCK badge from global indices detail pages as they show real Yahoo Finance data, not mock data.

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All V2 features working, minor MOCK badge issue on global indices)
